tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix shared /tmp/ahand-admin-spa.tar.gz race (Linux parallel-safety)
tasks.description:
Per-invocation temp + trap cleanup in install.sh; de-reference fixed path in install.bats:121.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dist/install.sh", "e2e/scripts/install.bats"], "verifyCommand": "cd e2e/scripts && bats --jobs 3 install.bats", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-invocation temp + trap EXIT", "bats --jobs 3 green 10x", "no real-install behavior change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GNU-parallel-aware --jobs gating in run.sh
tasks.description:
Gate --jobs on `parallel --version | grep 'GNU parallel'`; sequential fallback; mode echo.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e/scripts/run.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash e2e/scripts/run.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["moreutils parallel -> sequential, no abort", "GNU parallel -> --jobs", "mode logged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SHA-256 verification in install.sh (true parity)
tasks.description:
Mirror install.ps1 checksum verify; shasum/sha256sum detect; fail-closed; mocks/curl serves .sha256; 3 new bats tests (happy/tampered/missing).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dist/install.sh", "e2e/scripts/install.bats", "e2e/scripts/mocks/curl"], "verifyCommand": "cd e2e/scripts && bats install.bats", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fail-closed on mismatch/missing", "same artifacts as install.ps1", "tampered-artifact regression test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Filter browser-doctor remediation to host platform
tasks.description:

{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/cli/browser_doctor.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/types.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd browser_doctor", "acceptanceCriteria": ["host-only println, no brew on linux", "label via cfg! not env::consts::OS", "serialized form keeps all platforms"]}
```

```
